item.title:
Race_iQ: RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 31s Talk Of New York
Time Index: 6.1 (Meeting average: 4.9) 0-20mph: 2.51sec Top Speed: 39.57mph
RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 49s "I do have reservations because it’s been a long dry spell and we’re having a lot of trouble o
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 49s "I do have reservations because it’s been a long dry spell and we’re having a lot of trouble on the jumps tracks, but let’s hope we can run."
Nicky Henderson on Constitution Hill running on Saturday at Newbury racingtv.com Henderson to check Newbury ground for Constitution Hill Nicky Henderson will walk the track at Newbury on Wednesday before making a decision on Constitution Hill’s participation in Saturday’s Dubai Duty Free Finest S 54

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 4min Aintree winner Laafi has been disqualified from his victory last Friday after his jockey
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 4min Aintree winner Laafi has been disqualified from his victory last Friday after his jockey, Patrick O’Brien, went four strikes over the whip limit of seven 2 830

item.title: irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 8min Emperor lands the odds in Clonmel opener De irishracing.com 1 208
item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 8min Emperor lands the odds in Clonmel opener De irishracing.com 1 208
